top_signals.title: U.S. oil jumps more than 6% as Trump tells CNBC he doesn't care if Iran negotiations are over
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose on Monday after Israel instructed troops to push deeper into Lebanon amid renewed clashes with the Iran-backed Hezbollah group.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: What to Know About the SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is poised to have the largest stock-market debut in history when it holds its initial public offering in June. SpaceX is aiming to raise as much as $75 billion in the listing, more than twice the previous record holder, at a valuation of at least $1.8 trillion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Florida sues OpenAI and Altman for ‘hurting’ children
top_signals.summary: State files lawsuit over ‘litany of harms’ it claims the company’s chatbots have caused
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Florida AG sues OpenAI, seeks to hold CEO Altman personally liable for alleged harms
top_signals.summary: The complaint said the harms are the result of OpenAI's "insatiable quest to win the AI arms race and amass large fortunes."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
